release_notes: V14.44 build 206 mini-trend glucose layout patch: corrects the build number to 206 and keeps the layout improvement that replaces the oversized 7-segment glucose style with the smooth font used on the other screens, removes the GLUCOSE label, enlarges the glucose value so it fills the left card while still fitting 99.9, trims the 1-hour trend card so the glucose card can be wider, and includes OTA finalize/reboot hardening and alarm-safe OTA behaviour.
